entities.name: Tag
entities.note: Label attachable to a time entry; new classifier the CR introduces.
entities.source: tag each time entry with a label

explicit_requirements.text: A freelancer must be able to tag a time entry with a label.
explicit_requirements.source: add the ability to tag each time entry with a label

explicit_requirements.text: A freelancer must be able to filter the time-entry list by tag.
explicit_requirements.source: let us filter the time-entry list by tag

implied_requirements.text: A tag applied to a time entry must be persisted and associated with that entry.
implied_requirements.source: tag each time entry with a label … filter the time-entry list by tag
implied_requirements.rationale: Filtering the list by tag presupposes the tag survives across sessions and is queryable; an unpersisted label cannot drive a filter. Extends baseline time-entry persistence (R7).

unknowns.text: Can a time entry carry multiple tags, or exactly one label? CR says 'a label' (singular) but does not bound multiplicity.
unknowns.source: tag each time entry with a label

unknowns.text: Is the tag free-text or drawn from a controlled vocabulary the freelancer manages?
unknowns.source: tag each time entry with a label

unknowns.text: Does filtering accept a single tag only, or multiple tags combined (AND/OR)?
unknowns.source: filter the time-entry list by tag
